BeaconAI Action Brief

Recommended plays for the upcoming month.

State of store

healthy_beauty_240d. Repeat rate (L28): 9.0% (102.3% vs prior). Orders (L28): 2509 (96.8% vs prior). Returning-customer share (L28): 56.3% (11.5% vs prior). AOV (L28): $59 (-0.2% vs prior).

Recommended

Discount-dependency full-price re-engagement

Emerging

Send a value-led full-price re-engagement to the heavily discount-conditioned cohort after a 14-day discount-suppression window.

Why now: Cohort signal dominates — 1,917 customers carry discount codes on the majority of their order history (14 days post-send); calibrated to a validated DTC Beauty discount-suppression full-price conversion benchmark.

1,917 peoplecustomers whose >=50% of historical orders carried a discount

What we'd send: Suppress discount codes for 14 days for a discount-conditioned cohort; send a value-led, no-urgency, full-price reminder to recover full-price repeat purchases.

Observed: discount dependency hygiene full price conversion rate.
Estimated range (blend): $420 - $13,268

First-to-second cohort journey nudge

Emerging

Send a structured first-to-second nudge to the 30-90 day post-first-purchase cohort.

Why now: Cohort signal dominates — 1,213 first-time buyers placed their only order 30-90 days ago; calibrated to a validated DTC first-to-second benchmark.

1,213 peoplefirst-time buyers whose only order is 30-90 days before anchor
Observed: first to second conversion rate.
Estimated range (blend): $5,746 - $22,986

Dormant repeat-buyer winback

Emerging

Send a winback nudge to the dormant repeat-buyer cohort.

Why now: Cohort signal dominates — 356 repeat-buyers placed their last order 21-45 days ago; none have purchased in the past 28 days. Calibrated to a validated reactivation benchmark.

356 peoplelast order 21-45d ago, >=2 prior orders, no order in last 28d
Observed: reactivation rate.
Estimated range (blend): $843 - $3,371

Recommended Experiment

Plays we'd run as experiments. We will measure the result and learn whether they work for your store.

Discount-dependence cleanup

Run as experiment
2,251 peoplecustomers with discounted orders in last 28 days

What we'd send: Suppress discount codes for 14 days; send a full-price, value-led reminder; no urgency framing.

We will measure email-attributed revenue in 7 days.

Opportunity context: 2,251 eligible customers × $59 recent AOV (L28) = about $133.2k addressable order value.

This is not projected lift; it shows the size of the audience if the play converts.

Top-product re-targeting

Run as experiment
1,475 peoplebuyers of top-revenue product

What we'd send: Email a curated bundle of the hero SKU plus complementary products to recent buyers.

We will measure repeat purchase in 30 days.

Opportunity context: 1,475 eligible customers × $59 recent AOV (L28) = about $87.3k addressable order value.

This is not projected lift; it shows the size of the audience if the play converts.

Watching

Trending signals not yet ready to recommend.

  • aov↓ downThreshold to act: +/- 5% to fire an AOV play

Considered, not recommended

These plays have a real cohort on your store but aren't ready to recommend yet. Each card shows what we'd activate once measurement is in place.

AOV-threshold near-cohort cross-sell

Why held: Signal direction disagrees across data windows.

Signal direction disagrees across the L28 / L56 / L90 windows.

862 peoplecustomers with cart/typical AOV in [$46.63, $56.63] ($61.63 threshold minus $5-$15 band, snapshot)

What we'd send: Send a curated cross-sell email to customers $5-$15 below a merchant AOV threshold (free shipping or spend-X-get-Y), suggesting a specific SKU that would complete the threshold; no discount code.

Would fire if: Would fire if the signal is directionally consistent across multiple windows.

Lapsed-buyer reactivation (3–6 weeks since last order)

Why held: No measured signal cleared the threshold yet.

No measured signal yet for this play at this store; held as targeting until campaign outcomes calibrate the lift.

686 peoplelast purchase 21-45 days before anchor

Audience: 686 people | last purchase 21-45 days before anchor

Would fire if: Would fire once the audience can be measured against a valid comparison group.

Subscribe-and-save invitation for repeat buyers

Why held: Audience is too small to send.

Eligible audience is below the minimum send threshold this run.

2 peoplecustomers with >=3 same-product orders in last 90 days

Audience: 2 people | customers with >=3 same-product orders in last 90 days

Would fire if: Would fire if the eligible audience grows above the minimum threshold.

Complete-the-routine bundle

Why held: No measured signal cleared the threshold yet.

No measured signal yet for this play at this store; held as targeting until campaign outcomes calibrate the lift.

1,926 peopleskincare single-product buyers in last 60 days

What we'd send: Email single-product buyers a routine-completion bundle aligned to their starter SKU; two sends one week apart, no blanket discount.

Audience: 1,926 people | skincare single-product buyers in last 60 days

Would fire if: Would fire once the audience can be measured against a valid comparison group.

Data quality

No data-quality flags on this run.
